# Acme Billing Answers Full Export

> Reference Ansorum project for a billing and support answer corpus.

## Core Answers

### [Refund policy](https://answers.example.com/refunds.md)

---
id: refunds-policy
canonical_url: https://answers.example.com/refunds/
visibility: public
ai_visibility: public
intent: policy
entity: billing
audience: customer
llms_priority: core
token_budget: medium
canonical_questions:
- how do refunds work
- can i get a refund
retrieval_aliases:
- refund policy
- refund rules
related:
- cancel-subscription
---

# Refund policy

How refunds work, who qualifies, and when payment returns land.

Refund details for customers.

## Eligibility

Refunds follow the [billing policy](https://example.com/policy).

Customers can usually request a refund within 30 days of the original charge
when the service was not materially used.

## Exceptions

- Renewal charges after the refund window are normally non-refundable.
- Usage-based add-ons are reviewed case by case.
- Credits issued to an account may replace a cash refund when the billing issue
is operational rather than contractual.

## Where to ask

Contact billing support with the invoice number and the reason for the request.

How to cancel a subscription and what happens after.
